evidence_paragraphs.snippet: After dinner, the Elder Brother speaks in private with Brienne. He asks what she seeks in Saltpans, and when she mentions a highborn girl, the elder knows she refers to [Sansa](wiki:Sansa_Stark). He...

The Elder Brother then tells her that he was once a knight who fought for Prince [Rhaegar](wiki:Rhaegar_Targaryen) at the [Trident](wiki:Battle_of_the_Trident). He took several terrible wounds in the...
